testcase.name: test_assign_and_unassign_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected page, got {'page': None} assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33547c0>('page') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33547c0> = {'page': None}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sh_pages.py:174: in test_assign_and_unassign_flow assert data.get("page") is not None, f"Expected page, got {data}" E AssertionError: Expected page, got {'page': None} E assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33547c0>('page') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33547c0> = {'page': None}.get

testcase.name: test_delete_page_unassigns_users

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None is not None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33c68c0>('page') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33c68c0> = {'page': None}.get + where {'page': None} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sh_pages.py:213: in test_delete_page_unassigns_users assert r.json().get("page") is not None E AssertionError: assert None is not None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33c68c0>('page') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdded33c68c0> = {'page': None}.get E + where {'page': None} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
